name: Eggplant Dip
recipeIngredient: ¼ cup Olive Oil or Less
Serve With Melba Toast or Crudites.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F. Put the eggplants on a baking sheet and bake for about 40 minutes, until soft. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
2. Remove the stalks from the eggplants.
3. Puree the eggplants in a food processor with lemon juice, oil, and parsley and garlic (or chop the eggplants very finely by hand and mash and mix with the other ingredients). Season to taste.
4. Serve the dip on individual plates garnished with parsley, lemon wedges, and extra oil (optional). Or spoon into a small bowl and garnish before serving Melba toast.
(Eggplant is good grilled until charred all over—20 to 30 minutes. Scrape off the skin, rinse, then follow the recipe above.)
